summary: Completed testing of Submit Request buttons on pillar pages and Admin Quick Edit button functionality. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend testing verified: 1) PaperworkPage Submit Request modal opens with proper form fields (type dropdown, description textarea, urgency dropdown, submit button), 2) Submit Request form submits successfully and shows toast notification, 3) Quick Edit button visible on Advisory, Care, Travel, and Paperwork pages for admin users, 4) Quick Edit button correctly navigates to /admin?tab=page-cms&page={pillar} in new tab.

paperwork_submit_request_modal.details: Modal opens with: type dropdown (Document Organization, Scan & Digitize, Travel Document Prep, etc.), description textarea, urgency dropdown (Low, Normal, High, Urgent), Submit Request button

paperwork_submit_request_form_submission.details: Form submits successfully, modal closes, toast shows 'Request Submitted! Our team will help you with your paperwork within 24 hours.'

advisory_quick_edit_visible.details: Quick Edit button visible in bottom-left corner for admin user (dipali@clubconcierge.in)

care_quick_edit_visible.details: Quick Edit button visible in bottom-left corner for admin user

travel_quick_edit_visible.details: Quick Edit button visible in bottom-left corner for admin user

paperwork_quick_edit_visible.details: Quick Edit button visible in bottom-left corner for admin user

quick_edit_navigation.details: Quick Edit button opens /admin?tab=page-cms&page=advisory in new tab

quick_edit_not_visible_for_non_admin.details: Quick Edit button not visible when not logged in

backend_paperwork_request.details: POST /api/paperwork/request returns 200 with request_id starting with PAPER-

backend_advisory_request.details: POST /api/advisory/request returns 200 with request_id starting with ADV-

backend_care_request_validation.details: POST /api/care/request correctly requires pet_id and pet_name fields

backend_pillar_products.details: All pillar product endpoints (paperwork, advisory, care) return 200 with products array

backend_pillar_bundles.details: All pillar bundle endpoints return 200 with bundles array

critical_code_review_comments: AdminQuickEdit component correctly checks for admin role OR specific admin emails (dipali@clubconcierge.in, aditya@thedoggycompany.in)
PaperworkPage handleSubmitRequest function properly handles form submission with validation
All pillar pages (Advisory, Care, Travel, Paperwork) have AdminQuickEdit component added with position='bottom-left'
Quick Edit button has proper data-testid attributes for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Submit Request buttons on pillar pages are working. Quick Edit button is visible for admin users on all pillar pages and navigates to /admin?tab=page-cms&page={pillar}. Admin user check includes: user.role === 'admin' OR email includes 'admin' OR email is 'aditya@thedoggycompany.in' OR 'dipali@clubconcierge.in'.

verified_features.paperwork_submit_request_modal: VERIFIED - Modal opens with type dropdown, description textarea, urgency dropdown, submit button
verified_features.paperwork_submit_request_submission: VERIFIED - Form submits successfully with toast notification
verified_features.advisory_quick_edit: VERIFIED - Button visible for admin, navigates to /admin?tab=page-cms&page=advisory
verified_features.backend_care_request: VERIFIED - POST /api/care/request works with pet_id and pet_name
